response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct executive leadership experience in fintech or regulated environments. His background in agentic frameworks and event-driven systems is relevant, though not at the scale or seniority required for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
Proven track record in event-driven and microservices architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media)
Strong technical breadth across languages, frameworks, and domains (web, mobile, embedded, fintech-adjacent)
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., scaling teams from 10 to 30+, developing senior technical leadership)
Limited fintech-specific expertise (credit systems, payment flows, regulatory compliance)
Agentic AI experience appears more prototypical than production-grade for high-stakes environments
